title: fix: runner-image prebuilt-env bake fails on uv cache EACCES + add build smoke gate

checks.description: omnibase_infra PR #1834 (widen runner cache chown + add runner-image-build-smoke gate) merged to dev

On .201 linux/amd64 a from-scratch docker build --no-cache of the fixed Dockerfile completes the prebuilt-env bake (no EACCES); candidate identity label 231ae5fa883556778e9db274f1d5f83b == lock identity_digest; validate_runner_image.py RESULT: GREEN; live 48-runner fleet and omninode-runner:latest untouched
checks.command: docker build --no-cache docker/runners && docker run validate_runner_image.py --repo-root /repo
checks.output: NOCACHE_BUILD: SUCCESS; RESULT: GREEN; latest=d6372168c7ac; runners_on_latest=48

checks.description: New runner-image-build-smoke CI gate ran on PR #1834 (self-hosted CI runner), built docker/runners/Dockerfile through the prebuilt-env bake stage, asserted baked identity == lock + ready prebuilt env present
checks.command: gh pr checks 1834 --repo OmniNode-ai/omnibase_infra | grep runner-image-build-smoke
checks.output: runner-image-build-smoke pass 3m32s (Runner image build smoke PASSED: identity bound + prebuilt env baked)

checks.description: Dockerfile fix is identity-neutral; runner-image.lock.json identity_digest unchanged at 231ae5fa883556778e9db274f1d5f83b (runner_image_identity.py --mode verify passes; no --mode generate)
OCC PR #2061 carrying the OMN-12584 central contract + DoD receipts merged to OCC dev (Receipt Gate on infra PR passed in merge_group)
